revision.text:
[[commons:Category:Hakusan-jinja (Kasugai)]][[ja:白山神社 (春日井市二子町)]] {{Expand Japanese|白山神社 (春日井市二子町)}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Hakusan Shrine (Q11579597) | native_name = 白山神社 (春日井市二子町) | image = Ajiyoshi Hakusan Jinja01.jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Hakusan Shrine (Q11579597) | coordinates = {{coord|35.227267|136.936965}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | deity = {{ill|Izanagi|lt=Izanagi|ar|إزاناغي|az|İzanaqi|bcl|Izanagi|bn|ইজানাগি|bs|Izanagi|ca|Izanagi|cs|Izanagi a Izanami|da|Izanagi|el|Ιζανάγκι|en|Izanagi|eo|Izanagi|es|Izanagi|fa|ایزاناگی|fi|Izanaki|fr|Izanagi|he|איזאנגי|hr|Izanagi|hu|Izanagi|id|Izanagi|it|Izanagi|ja|イザナギ|ka|იძანაგი|ko|이자나기|lt|Idzanagis|mk|Изанаги|mni|ꯏꯓꯥꯅꯥꯒꯤ|no|Izanagi|or|ଇଜାନାଗି|pt|Izanagi|ro|Izanagi|ru|Идзанаги|simple|Izanagi|sk|Izanagi|sl|Izanagi|sr|Изанаки|sv|Izanagi|ta|இசநாகி|th|อิซานางิ|tl|Izanagi|tr|İzanagi|uk|Ідзанаґі|vi|Izanagi|zh|伊邪那岐|qid=Q813858|1=Izanagi}} }} {{nihongo|'''Hakusan Shrine'''|白山神社 (春日井市二子町)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Owari Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Hakusan shrine|lt=Hakusan shrine|qid=Q125314093|1=Hakusan shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Q134917287|ltq=Q134917287|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database * {{ill|Q135026601|ltq=Q135026601|qid=Q135026601|1=Shikinai Hiteisha}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Owari Province|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Owari Province|ja|尾張国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11465292|1=List of Shikinaisha in Owari Province}} ** Series ordinal: 78 ** P155: {{ill|Q11417045|ltq=Q11417045|qid=Q11417045|1=Ajima Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Itahato Shrine|lt=Itahato Shrine|ja|伊多波刀神社|qid=Q11379270|1=Itahato Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Q26101|ltq=Q26101|qid=Q26101|1=Kasugai, Aichi}} * {{ill|Q514506|ltq=Q514506|qid=Q514506|1=Owari Province}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|35.227267|136.936965}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database == image (P18) == * Ajiyoshi Hakusan Jinja01.jpg == dedicated to (P825) == * {{ill|Q813858|ltq=Q813858|qid=Q813858|1=Izanagi}} == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 181418 ** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 2180005008176 == Commons category (P373) == * Hakusan-jinja (Kasugai) == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '愛知県春日井市二子町2-11-3', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Hakusan-jinja (Kasugai)}} [[JA:白山神社 (春日井市二子町)]] {{wikidata link|Q11579597}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Hakusan Shrine |画像 = [[ファイル:Ajiyoshi Hakusan Jinja01.jpg|250px]]
Torii |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Aichi Prefecture|Q80434|qid=Q80434|1=Aichi Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Kasugai|Q26101|qid=Q26101|1=Kasugai, Aichi}}{{ill|lt=Futago-chō (Kasugai)|Q79370515|qid=Q79370515|lt=Futago-chō|1=Futago-chō}}2-11-3 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Izanagi|Q813858|qid=Q813858|lt=Izanagi-no-Mikoto|1=Izanagi}}、{{ill|lt=Izanami|Q682306|qid=Q682306|lt=Izanami-no-Mikoto|1=Izanami}}、{{ill|lt=Kikurihime|Q11619891|qid=Q11619891|lt=Kikurihime-no-Mikoto|1=Kikurihime}}、{{ill|lt=Umashimaji|Q10946169|qid=Q10946169|lt=Umashimaji-no-Mikoto|1=Umashimaji}}、{{ill|lt=Ame-no-Koyane|Q2564508|qid=Q2564508|lt=Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto|1=Ame-no-Koyane}} |社格 = former {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}、5th rank shrine |別名 = Ajiyoshi Hakusan Shrine |例祭 = Second Monday of October |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Aichi|label=Hakusan Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} [[File:Hakusan-jinja (Futago, Kasugai), haiden.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Haiden}}]] [[File:Hakusan-jinja (Futago, Kasugai), sandou.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Approach}}]] '''Hakusan Shrine'''（はくさんじんじゃ）is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Kasugai|Q26101|qid=Q26101|1=Kasugai, Aichi}}, {{ill|lt=Aichi Prefecture|Q80434|qid=Q80434|1=Aichi Prefecture}}. === Overview === Because there are five shrines with the same name in Kasugai City, it is also called '''Ajiyoshi Hakusan Shrine''' from the surrounding place nameHiroshi Ito, ''Historical Watching in Kasugai'', 1996, pp.34-35. In addition, an open-air market called "5 no Ichi" is held in the precincts on the 5th, 15th, and 25th of every month. === Origins === In 1659 ({{ill|lt=Manji|Q1145295|qid=Q1145295|1=Manji (era)}} 2), Hakusan Shrine formerly at Hakusan-yabu in Ajiyoshi Village (today Kusunoki-chō 5-chōme, Kita-ku, Nagoya) was relocated to the present site. At that time, {{ill|lt=Mononobe Shrine|Q11570698|qid=Q11570698|1=Mononobe Shrine (disambiguation)}} (a Shikinai small shrine) formerly on the mound of {{ill|lt=Ajiyoshi Futagoyama Kofun|Q11417036|qid=Q11417036|1=Ajiyoshi Futagoyama Kofun}} was merged, and the current shrine was established. The founding dates of both predecessor shrines are unknown. The shrine building stands on the mound of {{ill|lt=Ajiyoshi Hakusan Shrine Kofun|Q11417039|qid=Q11417039|1=Ajiyoshi Hakusan Shrine Kofun}}, and part of the remaining moat is used as a pond. In the past, mikoshi processions went from the shrine westward to {{ill|lt=Ajiyoshi Kasugayama Kofun|Q11417038|qid=Q11417038|lt=Kasugayama|1=Kasugayama}} (today Kasugayama Park), but because it obstructed traffic on the {{ill|lt=Inuyama Kaidō|Q11596828|qid=Q11596828|lt=Kiso Kaidō|1=Inagi Kaidō}}, during the Kan'ei era the destination was changed to a nearby mound ({{ill|lt=Otabisho Kofun|Q11489116|qid=Q11489116|1=Otabisho Kofun}}). In 1918 ({{ill|lt=Taishō|Q329174|qid=Q329174|1=Taishō era}} 7), {{ill|lt=Kasuga Shrine|Q11088805|qid=Q11088805|lt=Kasuga Shrine|1=Kasuga-no-Kami}} formerly at Kasugayama was also merged. === Enshrined deities === * {{ill|lt=Izanagi|Q813858|qid=Q813858|lt=Izanagi-no-Mikoto|1=Izanagi}} * {{ill|lt=Izanami|Q682306|qid=Q682306|lt=Izanami-no-Mikoto|1=Izanami}} * {{ill|lt=Kikurihime|Q11619891|qid=Q11619891|lt=Kikurihime-no-Mikoto|1=Kikurihime}} * {{ill|lt=Umashimaji|Q10946169|qid=Q10946169|lt=Umashimaji-no-Mikoto|1=Umashimaji}} * {{ill|lt=Ame-no-Koyane|Q2564508|qid=Q2564508|lt=Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto|1=Ame-no-Koyane}} === Precinct shrines === * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shinmei-sha|1=UNKNOWN}} - {{ill|lt=Amaterasu|UNKNOWN|lt=Amaterasu-Ōkami}} * Mikame-sha - {{ill|lt=Toyouke-hime|Q2983724|qid=Q2983724|lt=Toyouke-hime-no-Mikoto|1=Toyouke-hime}} * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Kokufunomiya|1=UNKNOWN}} - Owari Ōkunitama deity * {{ill|lt=Tsushima Shrine|Q705136|qid=Q705136|lt=Tsushima-sha|1=Tsushima Shrine}} - {{ill|lt=Susanoo|Q272993|qid=Q272993|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}} * {{ill|lt=Akiba Shrine|Q11595841|qid=Q11595841|lt=Akiba-sha|1=Akiba Shrines}} - {{ill|lt=Kagutsuchi|Q1640658|qid=Q1640658|lt=Hokutomochi-no-Mikoto|1=Kagu-tsuchi}} * {{ill|lt=Atsuta Jingū|Q482065|qid=Q482065|lt=Atsuta-sha|1=Atsuta Shrine}} - {{ill|lt=Yamato Takeru|Q461258|qid=Q461258|lt=Yamatotakeru-no-Mikoto|1=Yamato Takeru}} * {{ill|lt=Konpira Shrine|UNKNOWN|lt=Konpira-sha}} - {{ill|qid=Q10936701|lt=Ōmononushi|Q10936701|qid=Q10936701|qid=Q10936701|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto|1=Ōmononushi}} * {{ill|lt=Itsukushima Shrine|Q191763|qid=Q191763|lt=Itsukushima-sha|1=Itsukushima Shrine}} - {{ill|lt=Ichikishimahime|Q11059454|qid=Q11059454|qid=Q11059454|lt=Ichikishimahime-no-Mikoto|1=Ichikishima-hime}} === Cultural properties === * Ajiyoshi Hakusan Shrine Kofun / Otabisho Kofun - Aichi Prefecture-designated historic sites === Access === * {{ill|lt=Nagoya Railroad|Q30850|qid=Q30850|lt=Meitetsu|1=Meitetsu}} {{ill|lt=Meitetsu Komaki Line|Q6788786|qid=Q6788786|lt=Komaki Line|1=Meitetsu Komaki Line}} - about 10 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Ajiyoshi Station|Q4699746|qid=Q4699746|1=Ajima Station}}. * {{ill|lt=Tokai Transport Service|Q7862679|qid=Q7862679|1=JR Central Transport Service Company}} {{ill|lt=Jōhoku Line|Q7862680|qid=Q7862680|1=JR-Central Transport Service Jōhoku Line}} - about 5 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Ajiyoshi Station (Tokai Transport Service)|Q4699834|qid=Q4699834|1=Ajiyoshi Station (Jōhoku Line)}}. ※ It is very near the intersection of {{ill|lt=National Route 302|Q11421440|qid=Q11421440|1=Japan National Route 302}} (Nagoya Ring Route 2) and {{ill|lt=Aichi Prefectural Route 102|Q11494363|qid=Q11494363|1=Aichi Prefectural Road Route 102}} ({{ill|lt=Kami-kaidō (Kiso Kaidō)|Q11360097|qid=Q11360097|lt=Kiso Kaidō|1=Uwakaidō}}), but access by private car is difficult because there is no parking lot. === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} === References === * {{Cite book|和書|author=Hiroshi Ito|title=Historical Watching in Kasugai|year=1996}} === Related items === * {{ill|lt=Mononobe clan|Q1755836|qid=Q1755836|1=Mononobe clan}} * {{ill|lt=Ajiyoshi Hakusan Shrine Kofun|Q11417039|qid=Q11417039|1=Ajiyoshi Hakusan Shrine Kofun}} * {{ill|lt=Futagoyama Park (Kasugai)|Q111098257|qid=Q111098257|lt=Futagoyama Park|1=Futagoyama Park (Kasugai)}} === External links === * [https://www.city.kasugai.lg.jp/bunka/bunkazai/midokoro/1004373.html Ajiyoshi Hakusan Shrine Kofun / Otabisho Kofun] - Kasugai City * {{Commonscat-inline}} * [https://www.ajiyoshi-hakusanjinja.com/ Hakusan Shrine] {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Hakusan Shrine (Q11579597)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Hakusan Shrine (Q11579597)]][[Category:Hakusan shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Owari Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:春日井市の歴史]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Kasugai, Aichi]] [[Category:白山神社]]
